knownCurrentFailurePoints: relationship conflict can be compressed into a sudden reunion without setup
the recognition clue may appear as a prop shot instead of a causal turning point
the ending can resolve emotionally before the audience sees why the character changes
storyBaseline.comparisonGoal: Future planner output should show hesitation -> recognition clue -> emotional reaction -> unresolved/CTA-style suspense.

project.title: Synthetic baseline: short drama relationship conflict

input.userPrompt: Create a 30-second vertical short drama. A woman waits outside a library on a rainy night, recognizes an old promise through a yellow umbrella, hesitates, then leaves the audience with a reunion cliffhanger.

items.imagePrompt: front full-body reference of a young woman in a beige trench coat holding a book
side full-body reference of the same woman in the beige trench coat
back full-body reference of the same woman in the beige trench coat
single yellow umbrella with a small library card tag tied to the handle
rainy night city library entrance with warm interior light

narrativeEvents.action: the lead waits outside the library and almost leaves
narrativeEvents.resultingState: emotional distance and uncertainty are established

narrativeEvents.action: a yellow umbrella with the old library card tag appears beside her
the lead recognizes the tag and turns back toward the entrance
narrativeEvents.resultingState: the decision changes because of the clue

narrativeEvents.action: a shadow opens the library door as she steps forward
narrativeEvents.resultingState: the reunion remains unresolved and suspenseful

states.visibleTransitionPath: lead lowers her gaze and turns slightly away from the library
lead sees the umbrella tag and stops mid-step
lead turns from side view to front view and walks toward the opening door
umbrella enters frame near the library bench
camera moves closer to the handle tag
umbrella remains as the lead walks away from it toward the door

keyframes.imagePrompt: lead woman waits alone outside rainy library entrance, about to leave
yellow umbrella appears beside library bench while the lead notices it from side view
close emotional reaction, lead recognizes the old library card tag on the umbrella
library door opens with a warm silhouette, lead steps forward, cliffhanger ending

segments.videoPrompt: same rainy library entrance shot, lead starts to leave and then notices the yellow umbrella entering frame

microShots.imagePrompt: lead turns away while yellow umbrella is visible near bench

segments.videoPrompt: camera pushes toward the umbrella tag and the lead stops, recognizing the old promise

microShots.imagePrompt: library card tag on yellow umbrella handle, lead hand reaching but not touching

segments.videoPrompt: lead reacts, turns toward the door, and a warm silhouette opens it without revealing the person

microShots.imagePrompt: lead side view stepping toward the warm library doorway

candidates.purpose: side view for hesitation and noticing motion

keyframe:4.finalPrompt: rainy library doorway cliffhanger, one lead woman in beige trench coat, warm silhouette hidden, no extra faces revealed
